rows.notes: Confirmed by visual verification: the year is clearly '1764', not '1769'. Chose gemini-flash's description, overriding gpt-5-mini.

rows.description: July 26. P^d Dodd for 2 winter Lamps

rows.description: Sept^r 8. Mr Bishop on account of Merton

rows.description: — 25. Mr Wright a fee for advice
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms description and amounts £0 s1 d0. gpt-5-mini misread pence as '1'. gemini-flash's description is more accurate with the leading dash '—' and lowercase 'advice'. Chose gemini-flash, overriding gpt-5-mini.
rows.english_description: Fee paid to Mr Wright for advice.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Fee paid to Mr Wright for advice, amounting to £0 1s 0d.

rows.description: — 29. Mr Weston of Brackley in ye Merton Business
rows.notes: Amounts (£12 s12 d7) are consistent between extractors and visually confirmed. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description, specifically 'Brackley' and 'Merton Business', which gpt-5-mini misread as 'Brockley' and 'Weston Burying'. Chose gemini-flash's description.

rows.description: Oct^r 6. Harters Bill for Work at Few
rows.notes: Amounts (£5 s14 d6) are consistent between extractors and visually confirmed. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description, specifically 'Oct^r', 'Harters', and 'Few', which gpt-5-mini misread as 'Octr', 'Hesters', and 'Tew'. Chose gemini-flash's description.

rows.notes: Amounts (£6 s6 d0) are consistent between extractors and visually confirmed. The initial word of the description is somewhat ambiguous, but 'To Mr Bishop' from gemini-flash seems more consistent with the ledger's context and other entries than gpt-5-mini's 'Jo Wm Bishop'. Chose gemini-flash's description based on contextual reasoning and visual plausibility.
rows.english_description: Further payment to Mr Bishop on account (related to previous Merton business entries).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Further payment to Mr Bishop on account, amounting to £6 6s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts (£0 s1 d0) and most of description. Visual verification confirms the punctuation at the end of the description is a colon, as in gemini-flash. Chose gemini-flash.
rows.english_description: Payment recorded for the common price at Michaelmas (Michaelmas charge).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for the common price at Michaelmas, amounting to £0 1s 0d.

rows.description: — 15. P^d Mr Jackson for advertising about Fees
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description 'P^d' and 'Fees', and amounts £1 s0 d6. gpt-5-mini misread the pounds (0 instead of 1) and shillings (1 instead of 0), and the last word of the description. Chose gemini-flash, overriding gpt-5-mini.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Jackson for advertising concerning fees.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Jackson for advertising about fees, amounting to £1 0s 6d.

rows.description: — 31. P^d Mr Watts Bill in the Merton Business
rows.notes: Amounts (£36 s13 d0) are consistent between extractors and visually confirmed. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description regarding the leading dash '—', 'P^d', 'Watts' (without apostrophe 's'), and 'Merton Business'. gpt-5-mini misread these details. Chose gemini-flash's description.
rows.english_description: Payment of Mr Watts's bill in connection with the Merton business.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of Mr Watts's bill in the Merton business, amounting to £36 13s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on all values, row type, and empty description. Visually confirmed. gemini-flash's note about this being a sum of preceding entries is a helpful observation.

Amounts (1171, 12, 8, 0.25) are consistent and visually confirmed, including the '¼' fraction. gpt-5-mini correctly identified `row_type: 'total'`. gemini-flash had 'Receptoram' which is visually 'Receptionum'; gpt-5-mini incorrectly included the numbers in the description. Final description 'Summa Receptionum' derived from visual inspection. Overrode both extractors' descriptions and gemini-flash's row type.

Visual verification confirms amounts including the '¼' fraction, which gemini-flash missed. gpt-5-mini correctly identified the fraction and `row_type: 'total'`. Description is 'Deductis solutis' (correcting gpt-5-mini's 'soluti' and removing numbers from description, and gemini-flash's missed fraction). Overrode both extractors' descriptions and gemini-flash's fraction and row type.

Consensus on amounts (£188 s6 d4¼) and row type. Visually confirmed. gemini-flash correctly identified an empty description field for this total line, which gpt-5-mini incorrectly populated with numbers. Chose gemini-flash's structure.
